adapter_name.title: Name
adapter_name.description: Provide a unique name for this adapter instance. Example: compatible-gateway-1

api_key.title: API Key
api_key.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Leave empty if the endpoint does not require one.

model.title: Model
model.description: The model name expected by your OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Examples: gateway-model, gpt-4o-mini, openai/gpt-4o

api_base.title: API Base
api_base.description: Base URL for the OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Examples: https://gateway.example.com/v1, https://llm.example.net/openai/v1

max_tokens.title: Maximum Output Tokens
max_tokens.description: Maximum number of output tokens to limit LLM replies. Leave it empty to use the provider default.

max_retries.title: Max Retries
max_retries.description: The maximum number of times to retry a request if it fails.

enable_reasoning.title: Enable Reasoning
enable_reasoning.description: Allow the model to apply extra reasoning for complex tasks. Recognized reasoning models (gpt-5, o-series) are handled automatically; enable this only to tune the reasoning effort, or for reasoning models served under a non-standard name.

reasoning_effort.title: Reasoning Effort
reasoning_effort.description: Sets the Reasoning Strength when Reasoning Effort is enabled
